data.description: Build out the software portfolio listing page (src/app/work/software/page.tsx) and project detail pages. Should showcase software projects with visuals, descriptions, and process writeups — not just links. Each project gets its own page with blog-style documentation of the process.
data.title: Set up software portfolio page

data.body: Reference plan for screenshot capture & /update skill practice saved to notes/software-portfolio-review-plan.md. Covers all 4 live projects (Schelling Points, Arch Cupid, Rainbow Crawler, Snails vs Garden), the human/agent workflow split, and how visuals feed into both Now entries and future portfolio detail pages.
